summary: Preserved terminal MoonSpec verifier verdicts in accepted control evidence instead of rewriting them as ADDITIONAL_WORK_NEEDED. The broader transition, budget, control-stop, topology, contract, and boundary-test backlog remains bounded by the source verification report.

gapStatuses.requirement: Complete the plan-owned gate transition model and preserve every semantic verdict
gapStatuses.resolved: Accepted verifier control evidence now retains ADDITIONAL_WORK_NEEDED, BLOCKED, FAILED_UNRECOVERABLE, NO_DETERMINATION, and ENVIRONMENT_CONTAMINATED_BY_SKILL_PROJECTION exactly; focused parameterized coverage was added.
gapStatuses.remaining: Introduce the verifier transition decision before generic retry/no-progress accounting and explicitly distinguish successor advancement, exhaustion, malformed topology, verifier retry, and terminal stop.

gapStatuses.requirement: Separate and persist remediation, review, and no-progress budgets
gapStatuses.remaining: Derive remediation consumption from started remediation nodes, evaluate no-progress once across cycles, and persist complete budget and continuation objects in all required evidence.

gapStatuses.requirement: Add workflow control-stop and incident reconstruction evidence
gapStatuses.remaining: Add controlStop schema/state, reconstruction, downstream diagnostics, and tests without fabricating a failed execution.

gapStatuses.requirement: Validate preset topology and clarify verifier contract
gapStatuses.remaining: Validate remediation-pair topology and publication placement, audit sibling presets, and make recommendedNextAction advisory in injected verifier guidance.

gapStatuses.requirement: Prove the full transition contract at workflow and replay boundaries
gapStatuses.resolved: Added focused unit coverage for exact semantic-verdict preservation.
gapStatuses.remaining: Add real-preset advancement, exhaustion, no-progress, recoverable NO_DETERMINATION, ledger/incident, and pre/post-patch replay coverage; run the focused suites in a runtime with pytest and the hermetic startup preset environment.

targetedLocalChecks.details: The runner completed prerequisite audits, then reported /usr/local/bin/python: No module named pytest.
